ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the player */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Instagram handle of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* File path to the team logo */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the team */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Instagram handle of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team playing the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team playing the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who was the man of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_man_of_the_match FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "innings_played" INTEGER /* Number of innings played by the player in the match */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "average" REAL /* Average performance of the player in the match */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player in the match */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player in the match */,
  "four_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of four-wicket hauls in the match */,
  "five_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls in the match */,
  "boundaries_hit" INTEGER /* Number of boundaries hit by the player in the match */,
  "sixes_hit" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player in the match */,
  "maidens_bowled" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_teams" (
  "tournament_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's participation in a tournament */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_teams_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the injury */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the injury */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_innings" (
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each innings record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_batting" TEXT /* Team batting in the innings */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs played in the innings */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored in the innings */,
  "wickets_lost" INTEGER /* Wickets lost in the innings */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the innings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_innings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_squads" (
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squad record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "player_list" TEXT /* List of players in the squad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_squads_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_squads_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., match update, score update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message associated with the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_schedules_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "milestone_type" TEXT /* Type of milestone (e.g., 1000 runs scored) */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match where the milestone was achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_milestones_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_milestones_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., ICC rankings) */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking */,
  "ranking_points" INTEGER /* Ranking points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., ICC rankings) */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking */,
  "ranking_points" INTEGER /* Ranking points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
